title: The Bests of Vanilla
description: We collected the best mods for content creators to make their best videos
body:
# The Bests of Vanilla

## Best for content creators
We collected the best mods for content creators to make their best videos
### mods
- From replay mod to minimap and world map
- loading animated to iris and Inventory Profiles Next
### resources pack
- From low on fire to dark mod and flash animation 
## FPS Boost
One of the problems of Minecraft is that when there are many players on a server, the game lags
Very Many Players mod solves this problem
or
Nvidium = render distance 32
## bug fix
1. ModernFix
2. item bug fix
3. v,c,f8 bug fix
4. chest bug fix

**I watched videos for months about what mods and resource packs content creators use and I made this mod pack.**

**Hundreds of mods are updated every day, we try to update this modpack as quickly as possible and put it on the site.**

**All in this modpack, I hope you enjoy this modpack**
